description: Registry of all custom SQL blocks that cannot be expressed in Drizzle ORM schema language

CSQL-001.purpose: Convert audit_trail to partitioned table by quarter
CSQL-001.justification: Drizzle ORM does not support PARTITION BY RANGE syntax. Required for scalability and partition pruning.
CSQL-001.rollback: DROP TABLE audit.audit_trail CASCADE; Recreate as regular table

CSQL-002.purpose: Create quarterly partitions for audit_trail (2026 Q1-Q4, 2027 Q1)
CSQL-002.justification: Partition creation requires explicit CREATE TABLE ... PARTITION OF syntax
CSQL-002.rollback: DROP TABLE audit.audit_trail_2026_q1; (repeat for each partition)

CSQL-003.purpose: Create GIN indexes on JSONB columns (oldData, newData)
CSQL-003.justification: Drizzle supports GIN indexes but not jsonb_path_ops operator class for optimized containment queries
CSQL-003.rollback: DROP INDEX audit.idx_audit_old_data_gin; DROP INDEX audit.idx_audit_new_data_gin;

CSQL-004.justification: Stored procedures cannot be expressed in Drizzle schema language

CSQL-005.justification: Trigger functions require PL/pgSQL which Drizzle cannot express

CSQL-007.justification: Immutability enforcement requires BEFORE UPDATE/DELETE trigger
CSQL-007.rollback: DROP TRIGGER trg_audit_trail_immutable ON audit.audit_trail; DROP FUNCTION audit.prevent_audit_modification();

CSQL-008.justification: Complex tenant isolation logic requires PL/pgSQL trigger function

CSQL-009.purpose: Attach tenant isolation trigger to core.organizations table
CSQL-009.justification: Trigger attachments cannot be expressed in Drizzle schema

CSQL-010.purpose: Harden audit.log_change_7w1h() to guard missing columns and populate rowId
CSQL-010.justification: Function needs to handle tables without auditColumns and extract primary key dynamically
CSQL-010.rollback: Revert to original log_change_7w1h() from CSQL-005

CSQL-011.purpose: Fix audit.log_change_7w1h() column name mismatches with audit_trail schema
CSQL-011.justification: Previous function used wrong column names (changedBy/changedAt/rowId instead of actorId/occurredAt/rowKey)
CSQL-011.rollback: Revert to CSQL-010 version of log_change_7w1h()

CSQL-006.purpose: Attach audit triggers to tenant-scoped tables with auditColumns
CSQL-006.justification: Trigger attachments cannot be expressed in Drizzle schema. Enables automatic audit logging for organizations, locations, employees, users, roles, service_principals
CSQL-006.rollback: DROP TRIGGER trg_audit_organizations ON core.organizations; DROP TRIGGER trg_audit_locations ON core.locations; DROP TRIGGER trg_audit_employees ON hr.employees; DROP TRIGGER trg_audit_users ON security.users; DROP TRIGGER trg_audit_roles ON security.roles; DROP TRIGGER trg_audit_service_principals ON security.service_principals;

CSQL-012.purpose: CHECK constraints on talent.skills for skillCode pattern and name/description max length (aligns with Zod); idempotent if funny_wild_pack already applied
CSQL-012.justification: Defense in depth when app layer is bypassed; matches skillInsertSchema rules
CSQL-012.rollback: ALTER TABLE talent.skills DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_skills_skill_code; ALTER TABLE talent.skills DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_skills_name_length; ALTER TABLE talent.skills DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_skills_description_length;

CSQL-013.purpose: Optional trigger function + BEFORE INSERT/UPDATE trigger when legacy employee_skills.proficiencyLevel exists; otherwise drops stub objects (no-op path after funny_wild_pack)
CSQL-013.justification: PL/pgSQL cannot be expressed in Drizzle; conditional for migration-order compatibility with 20260320111648_funny_wild_pack
CSQL-013.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_employee_skill_proficiency ON talent.employee_skills; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS talent.sync_employee_skill_proficiency();

CSQL-014.purpose: Enforce performance_review_goals.finalScore only when parent performance_reviews.status is COMPLETED or ACKNOWLEDGED; block demoting review status while child rows have finalScore
CSQL-014.justification: Cross-table rule cannot be expressed with CHECK; complements ON DELETE RESTRICT on goalId for immutable evaluation history
CSQL-014.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_review_goals_final_vs_parent_status ON talent.performance_review_goals; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_reviews_status_vs_goal_finals ON talent.performance_reviews; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS talent.enforce_review_goal_final_score_vs_parent_status(); DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS talent.enforce_review_status_vs_goal_final_scores();

CSQL-015.purpose: exit_interviews: linked offboarding row must be active, EXIT_INTERVIEW category, matching tenantId/employeeId; offboarding_checklists cannot soft-delete or drift category/tenant/employee while referenced by active exit_interviews
CSQL-015.justification: Cross-table and soft-delete rules cannot be expressed with CHECK or FK alone
CSQL-015.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_exit_interviews_linked_checklist ON recruitment.exit_interviews; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_offboarding_checklists_exit_interview_guard ON recruitment.offboarding_checklists; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS recruitment.enforce_exit_interview_linked_checklist(); DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS recruitment.enforce_offboarding_checklist_for_exit_interviews();
